name: Message Coordination Unit Tests
description: Add comprehensive unit tests for _write_message_atomically, poll_for_messages, _load_processed_message_ids, _save_processed_message_ids in .claude/pair/pair_execute.py. Write a TestMessageCoordination class in .claude/pair/tests/test_pair_execute.py with at least 8 test cases covering happy paths, error paths, and edge cases. Use tempfile.TemporaryDirectory for filesystem tests.

name: Session Path Validation Hardening
description: Add input validation to session management functions in .claude/pair/pair_execute.py: generate_session_id should reject empty task descriptions, create_session_directory should validate parent exists, update_agent_status should validate status enum values. Write tests first (TDD) in .claude/pair/tests/test_pair_execute.py with a TestSessionValidation class covering at least 6 test cases.

name: Pair Monitor Edge Case Tests
description: Add edge case tests for PairMonitor in .claude/pair/pair_monitor.py: test _write_status_file with invalid JSON, test update_bead_status when beads file is locked, test _find_session_on_sockets when tmux binary is missing, test monitor initialization with empty strings. Write a TestPairMonitorEdgeCases class in .claude/pair/tests/test_pair_orchestration.py with at least 6 test cases.

name: Agent Name Generation Comprehensive Tests
description: Add comprehensive tests for generate_agent_names in .claude/pair/pair_execute.py covering: Unicode branch names, extremely long branch names (>128 chars), branch names with every special character type, concurrent session uniqueness (10 parallel sessions), empty/None inputs, and verify alphanumeric-only output for MCP Mail compatibility. Write a TestAgentNameGeneration class in .claude/pair/tests/test_pair_execute.py with at least 10 test cases.

name: Amazon Clone PairV2 Validation Flow
description: Generate a production-style Amazon clone benchmark with catalog, search, cart, checkout, and order confirmation lifecycle, including API behavior, UI rendering consistency, error-state handling, and evidence artifacts for verifier review.

name: SDUI Blog PairV2 TDD Benchmark (10k+ LOC)
description: See `testing_llm/pair/sdui_blog_tdd.md` for the full 12-phase TDD plan and acceptance criteria. Build the SDUI blog e-commerce benchmark via a scope-specific TDD contract, then run focused evidence checks with the paired PairV2 verifier tests.
